summary:
END TIMES AND GLOBAL TURBULENCE: Brandon discusses a period of escalating global turmoil, citing earthquakes, international conflicts involving Iran, economic instability with the stock market crashing, and the introduction of new tariffs. Brandon references the Book of Jeremiah and Matthew 24 to assert that the world is currently experiencing the biblical end times and the beginning of sorrows. Brandon warns against false prophets who operate at a lower spiritual level, which he likens to chickens rather than eagles, and who falsely promise an era of peace and prosperity. Brandon predicts a brief window of blessing for believers to prepare for severe turbulence, including major plagues, severe famines resulting in food lines, and an acceleration of events from one Rosh Hashanah to the next.

NATURAL DISASTERS AND MAJOR EVENTS: Brandon prophesies unprecedented natural disasters, specifically pointing to major volcanic eruptions in Italy and Rome, as well as oceanic disturbances where unfamiliar fish will rise from the depths. Brandon asserts that an impending, sudden event will occur within a 24-hour period that will drastically alter the world, drawing a direct comparison to the aftermath of 9/11. Brandon recounts a vision from January regarding a domestic invasion likened to a Red Dawn scenario, involving trucks and vans in ten major American cities. Brandon clarifies that this infiltration is orchestrated by Iran and other assisting nations, rather than China, and mentions the presence of three major generals who have already crossed the border.

TECHNOLOGICAL AND POLITICAL DEVELOPMENTS: Brandon states that technology, specifically Starlink satellites, will play a crucial role in fulfilling the biblical prophecy of the gospel being preached to the entire world before the end comes. Brandon foresees the implementation of a digital dollar and the rise of a cryptocurrency-based beast system. Brandon also predicts that Donald Trump, during his current term, will negotiate a peace treaty alongside the Saudi prince and Emmanuel Macron to facilitate the construction of the Third Temple in Israel. Brandon suggests that the Antichrist will only be fully revealed once the church, acting as the Great Restrainer, is removed from the earth.

CHURCH CORRUPTION AND REVIVAL: Brandon warns against the commercialization of ministry, recounting a personal experience of paying five hundred dollars to a major ministry in Dallas for an unsuccessful deliverance prayer for his daughter Megan. Brandon emphasizes that leaders who exploit the anointing for material gain, such as purchasing private jets and luxury items, will face sudden removal from their positions. Brandon foresees a massive, unconventional Woodstock style revival occurring in brush arbor settings, led by unknown individuals whom God will elevate overnight to replace the established, stiff-necked religious leaders. Brandon highlights the necessity for believers to avoid lukewarm behaviors, deliberate sin, and hidden transgressions in order to remain part of the faithful remnant.

HEALING, FORGIVENESS, AND MARITAL FIDELITY: Brandon declares divine healing over various physical and spiritual ailments, including cancer, diabetes, thyroid issues, and demonic strongholds like addiction. Brandon stresses the critical importance of releasing bitterness, specifically regarding past church hurt, and establishing healthy boundaries without harboring resentment. Brandon strongly advises against divorce, urging couples to remain committed to their marital vows unless facing biblical grounds such as infidelity or abuse. Brandon warns against workplace temptations and lust, instructing listeners to find their emotional fulfillment through faith rather than seeking it outside of their marriages.
rawData: [April 05, 2025]-[What the Lord is saying to me right now]-[https://youtu.be/LLfEcrp0TWs]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us today. Well, it's Brandon and Diana again, and we have some things on our heart. You know, I've been asking the Lord, 'Lord, there's a lot going on right now. There is a lot going on.' I told you all we would start to see these things—what the spirit of the Lord was showing me in prayer: the earthquakes, the wars and rumors of wars, the escalation with Iran. It seems like all is being stirred up like a pot, isn't it? But you can feel there's something major about to take place. And then we have all the tariffs happening and all the things going on with that, and the economy crashing 1,500 points the day before and 2,000 today, and most people are like, 'What's going on?' You know, and everybody wants to—'Where'd you go, Braden?' Listen, if I don't feel the presence of the Lord on a video and I watch it back with my family and I just go, 'I'm not going to release it.' I vowed to the Lord: if I do not sense the presence of the Lord on a video, I'm doing my best. You know, some of them you may say, 'Well, I didn't feel nothing on that video.' Well, it was semi-okay, so I release it. But I'm telling you, if I feel a video is dry, I'm not going to waste your time. I just don't want to waste your time. I'd rather it just be nothing on the air at all than for me to come on here and just ramble around. If I feel a leading, I'm going to put it out, and this is one I feel a leading on. I was praying and I was asking the Lord about things, and He said, 'I want you to start reading the book of Jeremiah. I want you to go over Jeremiah and look at what he went through and the things that I called him to say and warn the people that were not ready to hear what he had to say.' They persecuted him for what was coming. They persecuted him because of the things that he was saying and decreeing by the voice of the Lord. He was saying, 'Hey, this judgment's coming. These things are coming.' And you have a lot of itching-ear people right now, a lot of prophetic voices like I told you all that are giving words at a level down here. I'm not here to criticize because I'm not going to point any names out; I'm just telling you what I've heard the spirit of the Lord say. They're so apt to want to be the first is what I'm hearing—to be the one that is always in the spotlight like a Hollywood celebrity wanting to have their name in lights instead of going higher. And the Lord told me, 'There's a lot of my ministers that are speaking from a level down here instead of looking out like an eagle. They're not looking at the eagle level. They're prophesying down here with the chickens.' And He said, 'And when you do that, you're only able to see the trees in front of your face. You cannot see from a far distance what's coming to warn the people because you're prophesying down where the chickens are. And if you don't get up where the eagles are because the eagle has an eagle-eyed view and they're able to see miles away.' An eagle is able to see miles; they're able to see a long way and they're able to tell what's coming in the future from storms or whatever because they're able to see it. But if they're down there with the chickens, you're only able to see the trees. So, you're prophesying at the tree level and you need to come up higher in the mountain level. And that's where the Lord is. And the Lord told me, 'Brandon, are you not in the end times right now?' I said, 'Well, we see the signs, Lord. Of course I believe we're in the end times.' And He said, 'Then what did I say in my word was coming for those end-time people? If your generation is the closer generation—and we've heard it and heard it—if you are a closer generation, what are you expecting to come?' And He gave me Matthew 24. I want Diana to read this. And this is not a feel-good passage. This is not a feel-good, 'Wow, this makes me feel good. Oh, good times are coming.' If we're living in the last days, if we truly are living in the last days, what are we supposed to expect with an eagle-eyed view? What are we looking for? So, are we looking like everybody's saying there's good days coming, all this greatness is coming, 'Boy, I tell you what, this is going to be the best of the best'? Are we off when we say that? I don't know. Let's see. We're in the end times, right? So, what is the end? What did Jesus say we're supposed to expect? Go ahead and read chapter 24, verse 4. I want you to start there. Jesus answered them, 'Be careful that no one mislead you, deceiving you and leading you into error. For many will come in on the strength of my name, appropriating the name which belongs to me, saying, "I am the Christ, the Messiah," and they will lead many astray. And you will hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you are not frightened or troubled, for this must take place, but the end is not yet. For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom, and there will be famines and earthquakes in place after place.' Pause. There'll be famines and there's going to be earthquakes in place after place. So, there's going to be earthquakes all over the place, major earthquakes. What I tell you is coming—the Lord said in 2025 we're going to start to see major earthquakes. Then we had the one in Asia. Then we had another one in Asia. There's more coming. Keep going. There's pestilence and earthquakes, wars, rumors of wars. Keep going. 'All this is the beginning, the early pains of the birth pains of intolerable anguish. They will hand you over to suffer affliction and tribulation and put you to death. And you will be hated by all nations for my name's sake. And then many will be offended and repelled and will begin to distrust and desert him whom they ought to trust and obey and will stumble and fall away and betray one another and pursue one another with hatred. And many false prophets will rise up and deceive and lead many into error. And the love of the great body of people will grow cold because of the multiplied lawlessness and iniquity.' Okay, pause. So, He's warning right there that there's going to be a lot of people fall away. There's going to be a lot of people that are going to be persecuted for His name's sake. You're going to be tested basically by the world persecuting you because you're a Christian. Then He said we're going to see lots of false prophets rise up. I don't know—like I've said this before—I don't know of any other denomination or belief system that has prophets other than the Christian community. We don't have Buddhist prophets. We don't have Muhammad prophets. I haven't heard any, but there's a lot of Christians and a lot of it is the charismatic circle. Many false prophets are going to rise up. So does that make these people bad? No. It just means they're not hearing Him. They're down with the chickens. They're not hearing a clear direction. So anybody who gives a word that is off, that automatically makes it false. But does that make them a bad person? No. Are they doing it out of malice? Are they trying to be mean? Are they saying, 'Well, we're going to lead all these people astray'? No, I believe they're just missing it. Many false prophets. It's not somebody that's out there. I don't believe there's a lot of these people, because I've talked to them, that are doing it and trying to be deceitful. They're just down with the chickens and they're listening in front of their face instead of coming up higher with the fire, getting at the throne room and sitting at his feet. You're going to see a bird's-eye view, not a chicken-eye view down here. So many false prophets. So, are we in the last days? I believe we are. So, what are we supposed to expect? We're supposed to expect the things that he said in his word we would see. And this is the beginning of sorrows. And the Lord warned us this was coming. He said it would be the beginning of sorrows. That means we just started. So, if this is the beginning of sorrows, are there good days ahead? I don't know. I mean, because the word just said this is the beginning of sorrows. What does it mean to sorrow? Sorrow doesn't sound like a good thing to me. I'm just saying that doesn't sound like goosebumps and everything. When I hear sorrows, that seems sad. Sorrows is sad. That's a sad time. So it's the beginning of sorrows. So we have a lot of words being given, and I'm not here to point out people, but we have a lot of words being given about the United States is going to do all this stuff, and we're going to do all these things, and everything's going to get better for a season. And the Lord told me we have a window, a season of blessing for the remnant to get up the wealth of the wicked to lay up for the righteous. He said, 'Why?' Because there's great days of turbulence coming. Very hard days are coming. Matthew 24. So, let's keep reading. 'But he who endures to the end will be saved, and this good news of the kingdom, the gospel, will be preached throughout the whole world as a testimony to all the nations. And then will come the end.' So, we're going to see the gospel preached throughout the whole world. And I'm telling you, I believe Starlink will have a big hand in this. Starlink, the internet, bringing these satellites that the internet is preached throughout all the devices, YouTube, and things like that. The word is going forth into all nations. And it's not by internet cable anymore. It's by a link. You can have it on your phone and you have a signal, and all of a sudden you're able to see the word anywhere in the world by a signal. So it will be preached throughout the whole world and then the end will come when the gospel is preached. So I believe that's the end-time revival. I believe there's a glorious outpouring that has yet to happen, and we will see it throughout every island, all over the world, because God is going to give every unbeliever an opportunity—leaving the 99 to go after the one—to open their ears to let them hear what's about to take place so that you can't get up to the throne and say, 'Well, I never had the opportunity to hear it.' Because listen, this is the first time in history, in any generation, that God is saying it's over. It's always been by your hand or your great-grandma's hand that she died and rejected Christ. They had the opportunity, but they just denied it. But this is the first time in history that God said, 'I'm ending time as you know it. I'm ending it.' So it's not by them dying. It's by me saying it's over. Does that make sense? It's the first time ever that God's saying time as we know it will be no more. So he's giving everybody an opportunity to have the choice to reject it or accept it. So we're seeing it right now. Men's hearts are growing cold. There's a great falling away. The statistics are that there's less people coming to Christ than there were at this time. I look at people sending me things, and I get it. The word told us this would happen. But he said, 'Brandon, I'm going after the one. I'm going after the one that I see their heart, that maybe they just have that one opportunity to accept me as their Lord and personal savior.' And I'm telling you all, we're going to see the glory cover the earth like waters cover the sea. So this is what he told me in Jeremiah. And we're going to see the glorious church rise up like we've never seen before. But he's given me these scriptures. He wants me to tell you all it's not good days coming. It's like looking at a quarter. You can see the glory or you can see the darkness. And that's where we're at right now. Things are going to escalate in a rapid manner. From Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah, he said things would accelerate. As labor pains upon a woman, so will it be. It said it in the word. So, we're seeing labor pains increase. We are going to see some major earthquakes. We are going to see some major volcanoes. People say, 'Well, there's volcanoes going off right now, Brother Brandon,' because Diana got the email. She goes, 'Well, they're talking about your volcanoes again, what you said you saw.' They're happening in Iceland. They're happening in a couple in Alaska. One's happening in Hawaii. Folks, those aren't major volcanoes. I said major volcanoes. You need to look at Italy. Watch Rome. Watch Italy. Watch this area. I'm telling you, a major shaking is about to take place in areas that you didn't believe possible. So much so that it will happen in the sea. I'm telling you, you must look at the oceans. Look at the oceans. Many fish are going to start to die. You will see it. And it will be like in Hosea. You'll see this. The fish are going to start coming up from the depth. And you're going to go, 'What kind of fish is that? We've never even seen that fish before.' Watch. Remember what I'm telling you. You're going to see these things. Volcanoes are going to go off on the ocean floor and there's going to be great shakings and you will see fearful sights. And it will be so much so that you cannot look horizontal in the natural. If you look on the news, if you look on what's going on around you, it will cause mere men to fear. And it said in the word that men's hearts will fail them for fear, looking after those things that are coming upon the earth, for the powers of the heavens shall be shaken. You're going to see things that you did not ever dream you would see. The Bible even said that the earth would rock and reel like a drunkard with earthquakes and things. So, we're going to see some radical stuff up in here that you never believed you would see, folks. But the Lord told me when I was getting ready to do this video, he said, 'Brandon, I'm about to show up in a way that this generation has never seen before.' In any of these generations, probably from your great-grandma to whoever is on this earth right now, you've never seen a showing up and showing off like you're about to see, where you will say, 'God is God.' And in a 24-hour period, everything's going to change. Everything's going to change and you're going to look back and say, 'Do you remember how things changed so quickly after 9/11?' It was a United States event, but it affected the whole world. In a matter of just a couple of moments, one day, 24-hour period, everything changed. Folks, I'm telling you, another event is about to take place. Another major event is about to take place. I heard somebody sent me an email again. You told me, 'Brandon, Cindy Jacobs just gave a word that told about the terrorist cells inside of America.' And she named off Dallas. She named off San Diego. She named off Los Angeles. And she named off New York. Folks, I told you 10 cities. I told you 10 major cities. I saw this in January to warn you all, 10 major cities, about trucks and vans with... but it was not terrorists. I said these are... this is a nation inside of our nation, and it is an act of war. What I have seen coming: attacks from within, attacks within, a Red Dawn experience. And we have another prophetess, a lady that I believe hears the voice of the Lord. Over time, she has a track record saying, 'This is what I've seen coming. We must pray.' I told you to pray for our churches' Easter as we come against Iran, as we come against Hezbollah, as we come against these terror groups. There are hidden cells, the enemy within, a Red Dawn experience inside of our nation. Is it China? People say that was what the movie is about—was China. Is China in our nation? I don't know about China. The Lord didn't show me China. The Lord showed me Iran. The Lord showed me Iran. You need to hear that. The Lord showed me Iran and other nations. They were like assisting inside us as they infiltrated across the border. Three major generals—I've warned you about these generals. They're still here. And most people go, 'Well, we haven't seen nothing happen.' Glory to God. Glory to God that we have not seen those trucks go off, but the vans... but I'm warning you. I know by the Spirit of the Lord this is not over. And most people are like an ostrich. They put their head in the sand and they don't want to know what's going on. They don't... 'Well, you know, he's a false prophet. They didn't hear it right.' Oh, because it didn't happen in your timing. Thank God Daniel is not... you know, after how many thousands of years, some of his words have still not come to pass, and he's in the Bible. Glory to God, folks. I'm telling you, it's His grace and His mercy and His timing of when things are going to take place. But I'm telling you, when I've been praying lately, the Lord said to me, 'You need to look at Jeremiah. You need to read Jeremiah, Brandon, for you're a type and shadow of a Jeremiah in these last days.' And I said, 'Lord, that's harsh. What is that?' So, Diana, I've been reading Jeremiah over and over. I've been meditating on one of the scriptures, but this is the one He gave me. And so, read Jeremiah, baby. Then I said, 'Oh, Lord God, behold, the prophets say to them, "You shall not see the sword, nor shall you have famine, but I will give you assured peace in this place."' And the Lord said to me, 'The prophets prophesy lies in my name. I have not sent them, commanded them, nor spoken to them. They prophesy to you a false vision, divination, a worthless thing, and a deceit of their heart. Therefore, thus says the Lord concerning the prophets who prophesy in my name, whom I did not send, and who say sword and famine shall not be in this land. By sword and famine, those prophets shall be consumed, and the people to whom they prophesy shall be cast out in the streets of Jerusalem because of the famine and the sword. They will have no one to bury them, nor their wives, their sons, nor their daughters, for I will pour their wickedness on them. Therefore, you shall say this word to them: "Let my eyes flow with tears night and day, and let them not cease. For the virgin daughter of my people has been broken with a mighty stroke, with a very severe blow. If I go out to the field, then behold those slain with the sword. And if I enter the city, then behold those sick from famine. Yes, both prophet and priest go about in a land they do not know."' What I want to say to you all is that there's a lot of people speaking to a lot of itching ears. And I'm telling you all by the Spirit of the Lord, what I've seen as I go up higher is that God has given us that window. And in this window, what will you do with it? I'm telling you all that I've seen hard times coming for some, especially the ones that are not listening. There's a great shaking to awaken that's about to take place upon the world. It's not just about America. Well, what about Donald Trump? What about all this? I told you I've seen a plague. I told you I've seen these plagues like Jesus talking about. I'm talking about major plagues. I'm talking about major famine. So much so that there were lines down the road trying to find food, trying to get food. When you say, 'When is that going to happen?' I don't know. I can't give you an exact date. On this day, at this, it's going to manifest. I see in part, hear in part. All I know is as I go up higher, as an eagle's eye view, I see these things coming. I see a major revival with brush arbor churches. I saw people that looked like a sea of people with a Holy Ghost Woodstock revival. And it wasn't happening in your average churches that thought they were qualified to have it. 'Well, we walk in holiness. We walk... we don't wear makeup. We don't cut our hair. We don't do... well, we qualify ourselves and so we're there.' No, it's people that you least expect it that God is going to put His finger on them as a new David and say, 'Rise up, son or daughter, and take my gospel throughout the whole world.' And you will see people that were just the people in the back corner that God's going to bring up to the forefront overnight. And the people who are on the forefront right now are going to lose their positions because they don't want to let God be God and flow in the Holy Ghost in the churches. And you're going to see people that have huge platforms in the days ahead lose everything within a 24-hour period. And you're going to see them that they're going to go, 'Whoa, my goodness, what happened to their ministry? Well, my goodness, where is this person coming from?' because they were the ones that just said yes. And the ones that are on the platform now are the ones just saying no. 'Well, we've done church this way for all these years, and it's been this way for all these years, and we love the way it's been for all these years, but God says, "Behold, I'm going to do a new thing."' And you are so backbone-stiff-necked to Him saying, 'I'm going to do it this way, and this is the way we've always been.' And God says, 'I'm going to do something new in this generation. And I'm going to bring the Holy Ghost in a new way and a new era of time with a new river instead of flowing the way you've always done it.' And if you are stiff-necked, I'm telling you, there's sin behind the pulpits more than just being stiff-necked. And the Lord said, 'Judgment begins in the house of the Lord first.' And He warned me. He said, 'Brandon, don't touch the gold, and don't touch my glory.' And there's many prophetic voices right now that are touching the gold and the glory. There's many preachers right now that are touching the gold and touching the glory. He told me, He said, 'If you're touching the gold and you're touching the glory,' just like He told Oral Roberts, He said, 'Woe unto you.' Because that anointing... you'll see it present on people's lives in the past, and you'll go, 'What happened to them?' It's like they're dried in the desert. You're in the Mojave, and you go, 'What happened to the Holy Ghost?' Because He pulled His stuff from you. He pulled the glory from you, and He's not going to share it with anybody. He said to me, 'If you deflect it to the Father all the time, you're going to walk with me, son. If you never ask my people for a dime, I'll pour it out on you. I'll bless you in the city and the field coming in. But you'll never use your platform ever in any way to go and solicit my people for anything. If you feed my people, they will feed you. If you preach the word to them, they'll take care of you. But you never solicit, pastor, you know, go up there and do this. No, just preach and bring the glory down, and God will take care of you. You're not doing it to get the people to give you something.' The Lord told me, "There are many of my prophetic voices right now who have used the anointing and the glory for material gain." They've used it for material gain; they have big jets, big cars, and all this stuff. God doesn't care about you being prosperous, ladies and gentlemen; it's not about that. He wants you to have exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. But don't sell the anointing. Pray for the people. Freely you've been given, freely you give it out. It doesn't cost anything. You know how many people think, "If I pray for that person and they get healed of cancer, I deserve payment"? We went to these people because we wanted deliverance; people told us that Megan had a devil and that she had autism because of it. We were desperate. As a young person at twenty-some years old, I said, "Oh my gosh, I don't know where to go to get a devil cast out, but if she has a devil, Diana, let's go!" So, we spent all we had on a credit card and drove down to Dallas because they wouldn't pray for her until they received payment. They wanted five hundred dollars. We paid them the five hundred bucks on a credit card because we needed the deliverance. We were crushed when we left and no devil was out. This is a major ministry, and they still took the money. We paid for hotels and childcare to come with us and bought their hotel because we thought, "This is it. Once we get this devil cast out, we're going to get our miracle and she's going to talk because it's the devil holding her tongue." I'm telling you folks, I've seen it all, and woe unto you who have done that kind of stuff. We've lived it, and it was crushing. I walked away feeling like somebody had punched me in the stomach. If I mentioned their ministry, you would freak out. I would, but I vowed I'd never do it. Love takes no account of a suffered wrong. Not only that, love doesn't do that to his brother. They'll fall on their own; they'll do it themselves. I'm telling you, the anointing is going to expose people like that because if it happened with us, it's happened to a lot more, trust me. Those days are over. You will see an arising of new faces in the days to come because of the way the anointing was distributed in the past. We've been to places where the glory came into a service after the main speaker left, and the shekinah glory showed up because God was waiting for the main speaker to be done. The glory wasn't on that speaker, and He was waiting for them to leave. There's a problem, folks. We will see a line coming in the body of Christ like we've never seen before with people who are rising up and just saying "yes" versus the people who thought they were something. Big heads and big egos are coming, and God is saying, "Look, I'm looking for somebody who's just humble." We deflect to You, Lord, because without You, we can do nothing, but with You, we can do anything. All things are possible to him who believes. I just wanted you to be aware of Jeremiah and Matthew 24 and know we are in the last days. The things you're going to see in the near future will be shock and awe for some of you because you've listened to so much sugar. You've eaten so much sugar that your teeth are rotten and you need to get off of it. It's destroying you. Get on a sugar cleanse because we are in the last of the last days and Jesus Christ is coming back again. He's coming back for a church that has a backbone and is without spot or wrinkle—not one with demonic oppression where you're walking around busted and disgusted with demonic strongholds. Wrinkles are hidden sin—walking around looking at stuff on the internet, partying, drinking, and acting a fool, thinking that you are a part of the remnant when you are not. I'm not saying you have to be self-righteous, but there's a difference between practicing sin and trying not to. People fall, but we don't practice it on purpose. Lukewarm means you are practicing sin on purpose. "I'm purposely going to go out tonight to the club to dance, get high, smoke our reefer, drink some whiskey, and have sex with my girlfriend, but we're saved and part of the remnant." You're a fool. If you messed up, fine—repent, take communion, and say, "God, forgive me," but don't make a habit of it. Repent means to turn away from. I will not have a lifestyle of practicing this and thinking that I'm godly. It's so foolish. I'm talking about the person who is deliberately being an idiot. Deliberate sin. "I'm going to snort that cocaine and then I'll repent afterwards. I've got this bag of coke and I'm just going to go to town on this. I bet Jesus is going to forgive me." I'm not saying that God won't forgive you if you confess your sins, but I'm talking about going in the Rapture; I'm talking about people who are sold out for God. I want to shake you for what's coming. I was sitting in the car praying and looking out over an Irish pub in Tulsa. I was eating my fish because the Lord's been on me about taking care of myself. I saw all the people going in, and they are oblivious to what's coming. We are the frog in a pot and the water is boiling around us, but we have no idea because we've become so desensitized to our surroundings. As I was sitting there, the Lord told me, "Brandon, there's going to be an event." There's going to be a major event that everyone—it's going to get their attention. I just refuse to have your blood on my hands. That when you get up and you're standing before the Father, you can say that no one warned you. I warn you with everything I have inside of me to warn you as a man of God. I'm just Brandon, but I stand on my wall and I look out on the edge of the horizon of time, my wife and I, and we yell as loud as we can to tell you: Jesus is coming. But I'll not have your blood on my hands. And you get before the Lord and say, "No one warned me." Prophet so-and-so said all things were good, everything was going to be all right for so long, and we had fifty years, we have all this time. Folks, no man knows the day or the hour. But as we watch the fig tree, Israel, as we look at the signs of what He said was coming in His beautiful Word, you yourself can discern and see that, can't you? If you just take a moment to look and go inward—do you not feel the urgency? Do you not feel the shaking inside of you warning you that Jesus is coming? I believe even somebody with one eye and half sense could see around them with wars and rumors of wars, earthquakes in divers places, and what you're about to see as the economy crashes, as the Dow Jones plummets 2,000 points, 1,500—all these things.
